hero.badge: Ministerially Accredited · Est. 2015 · Juba, South Sudan

slides.headline: Education for Sustainable Development
slides.sub: Equipping students with digital skills, data fluency, and innovative thinking to lead South Sudan's knowledge economy.

slides.headline: Empowering South Sudan's Future Leaders
slides.sub: World-class faculty. Rigorous programmes. A community committed to peace, justice, and national development.

slides.headline: Where Knowledge Meets Purpose
slides.sub: From the Nile to new nations - our graduates carry the torch of learning into every corner of South Sudan and beyond.
